messages.content: Set an SEO title and meta description optimised for the target keyword 'coffee vending machines for offices'.

context.title: Coffee vending for offices

props.heading: Old headline
props.body: Coffee vending machines for offices keep teams stocked with fresh drinks without anyone owning a brewing rota. A managed machine covers restocking, cleaning, and fault response so facilities can stay focused on the building.

input.metaDescription: Explore modern coffee vending machines for offices. Learn about managed replenishment, service options, and how to choose the right unit for your workplace culture.
input.seoTitle: Coffee Vending Machines for Offices | Managed Workplace Solutions
input.title: Coffee Vending Machines for Offices
